resources.string: Search by package name or app name
Say an app name or keyword to search on Blindo
Do you want to clear all your search history?, this action cannot be undone
Notifications about updates and new features
%1$s. If you want to change your ads preferences set your consent again, also you can buy a Blindo subscription to remove all the ads.
You prefer to show personalized ads
You prefer to show non-personalized ads
You have a Blindo subscription so you do not show ads
You indicated that you prefer to purchase a subscription but you have not done
You are not from Europe so you are not able to change your ads preferences and Blindo will show personalized ads
Unknown ads consent status, please set your consent
Internet connection error or ads blocker is detected

Welcome to Blindo, the most important and biggest accessibility community where you can find ratings, comments and screenreaders labels for Android. If you want to know how to use Blindo press next, otherwise press omit
In home you can see all the apps registered on Blindo with some information like app category, accessibility rating and available labels packs, press any one to open details about the app

Each app have 3 categories of details to show, the general info with the accessibility ratings showed by category, the list of labels packs with the owner, the number of labels, the last update date and the language for the pack; and the comments list where you can see the comments and accessibility ratings that the users gave to the app. Also you can create new rating for the app pressing "New rating" option at the top of the window below the app name
Also you can see a list of your installed apps in "My apps" option of drawer menu. Here you can go to the details of any app and, if is available, you can see all the details
The Smart Labels Installer (SLI) allows you to run an auto generator of labels for your installed apps with different options to customize your pack
Blindo will collect and storage some sensitive data from your device and about you to works well

You need a Blindo account to access to some features, if you prefer to omit this step, you can sign in or sign up in any moment in the drawer menu. However some functions will be available without an account

You can access to exclusive features purchasing a premium membership, with this you can translate labels in other languages, launch the SLI without limits, remove all the ads in Blindo and more, Do you want to purchase a premium membership now?
Enjoy Blindo and help us to improve the Android accesivbility, you can see this tutorial any time at drawer menu

array.name: tutorial__privacy_policy_terms_conditions_data
array.item: Personal info like full name, username or email, and social network profile photo to create your Blindo account
Device info like your device ID, manufacturer, model and other device properties to associate it to your Blindo account
Installed apps info including app public names and package names, only collected when you use the Smart Labels Installer (SLI) to generate your custom labels pack
Accessibility services info including the package name of all your installed accessibility services rewardless if they are assistive software or not to generate label packs with the correct format

resources.string: I accept the privacy policy and terms and conditions

With an account you can access to exclusive features on Blindo like publish new ratings, comments or labels on our community, however you can continue without an account but some features wont be available until your sign in. Press continue to sign in or sign up
Error during authentication, please try again
Error: this device can not be registered because it is asigned to another user or the request have errors, more details below
We send you a verification email, please follow the instructions and, when you already verify your account, press continue. If you want to verify your email later you can skip this step
If you skip the email verification some Blindo features could not available, however you can complete this step later
Your account has not been verified yet. If you already verify your account please skip this step, however you can verify later. Last verification status: %1$s
Hi %1$s, now you have access to Blindo community, remember that some features require a subscription. Press continue to finish
Your email is not verified, some features wont be available
Sign in or create a Blindo account to access to all incredible features, it\'s free for basic features like download labels packs and backups
You requires a premium membership to do this
Unknown error updating your profile, please try again later
Error: User is not signed in

SLI analize your installed apps and generate a custom labels pack for you selecting the best labels for you trying to cover all the unlabeled buttons in your device. You can translate labels from other languages to increment the number of possibilities, also you can prefer your backup and complet the missing labels with our smart installer
We can\'t get your installed apps, please try again, if the problem persist contact us
Found %1$d apps, search for labels in %2$s prefering %3$s and %4$s. Do you want to continue?
We can\'t found any label for your apps and your current SLI configuration, please try again with other configuration
Found %1$d labels in %2$s for %3$d apps. Do you want to install it?
Unable to download and save your custom labels pack, verify if you have 10 MB or higher of free disk space in your internal memory and try again
Get access to premium features and enjoy the best accessibility experience in your Android without limits and help us to make the biggest accessibility community in the world!

Take advantage of your labels backup and restore it only in one click, no more missing labels or hard transfering between devices, just press restore my backup and all your labels will be in your device in a few seconds

Use our Smart Labels Installer (SLI) to automaticaly generate a custom labels pack with all available labels for your apps. Don\'t search one by one the best labels for your apps, run Blindo SLI and get a labels pack specialy generated for you with auto translates and more

Do you wanna a labels pack but it\'s in other language?, translate and install it in just one click. Now you can search for labels packs in other languages to grow your labels collection and enjoy the most accessible experience in your Android
Remove all the ads in Blindo and help us to continue developing and growing up our community
Get a membership now by %1$s monthly
This is a recurrent payment, every month %1$s will be charge to your payment method and you can cancel any time
Your subscription is %1$s, press manage subscription if you want to cancel or change the payment method
Your next payment will be processed at %1$s, if you cancel your subscription your membership will be available until this date and the payment won\'t processed
Error: Google Play Services is disconnected, please verify your internet connection and try again
Error: your Google Play Service don\'t support subscriptions, please update your Google Play Service and try again
Error: Google Play Service is not available, verify that you have the latest version of Google Play Service and try again
Error: Google Play Services is not able to response, are you have a valid Google Play Services version installed\?
Your purchase is complete but we still processing it, this don\'t affect your premium account but maybe you could wait some minutes to have a full access to premium features
The accessibility rating of the app functions
The app performance rating when a screenreader is enabled
No app details, add new rating or update labels pack to register the app
All the ratings are required and the minimum value is 1 star, the comment is optional and the language of your device will be used as reference
You must wait more than %1$d seconds displaying the ads before install the pack, if you want to remove all the ads you can purchase a premium account

Your labels will be updated or created and will be available for all the Blindo users and in your backup. Please don\'t include bad words or any bad expression or language, your account could be suspended if you violate the vocabulary rules
Detected %1$d labels for %2$d apps in %3$d different languages (%4$s)
Error: the file is empty or isn\'t recognized as a labels pack
Processing your labels, this could take few seconds, don\t close this window
Success, created or updated %1$d packs, skiped or duplicated %2$d and %3$d with errors. Thanks for colaborate with Blindo community, you rock!
You don\'t have any pack yet

The modification, adaptation, translation, derivation, copying, distribution and/or marketing of this application and any of its algorithms, components and sub-components, as well as services offered excluding the services and/or components of third parties integrated and authorized for use within it, is prohibited
Read our terms and conditions and privacy policy
You don\t have any rating or comment yet
Select the fields to order and their direction, The priority will be shown as a number value begining from 1 according the same order that you add fields
